name: Vivani Medical, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company Company Overview Vivani Medical, Inc. (Vivani, the Company, we, us, our or similar terms) is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company which develops miniature, ultra long-acting subdermal drug implant candidates utilizing its proprietary NanoPortal technology, which is designed to enable reversible, ultra long-acting, near constant-rate delivery of a broad range of medicines to treat chronic diseases.
